# Kahoot!

July 10th 

## Announcements

- Project proposal due this Sunday 07/12: 
  - Send it to your classmate by 07/12 
  - Review it and provide constructive feedback:
    - Parts you don't understand 
    - "Did you consider xyz?" 
    - Comment on the text, not the author 
  - Return your feedback by Friday 07/17 (CC me). 

- Final project proposal + tutorial due Sunday July 19th.
